Landing.heroTitle: The Future of African Fixed Income
Landing.heroSubtitle: Access, trade, and settle government bonds across Africa seamlessly.
Landing.aboutP1: The African Government Bond Exchange (AGBX) is a secure, institutional-grade platform designed to connect retail and institutional investors directly with high-yield government bonds in Mozambique.
Landing.aboutP2: We eliminate traditional barriers to entry by providing a transparent, fully digital brokerage experience where you can securely verify your identity, browse active bond issuances, and track your portfolio's performance in real time.
Landing.aboutFeature1Desc: Strict KYC/AML compliance ensuring bank-grade security for all transactions.
Landing.aboutFeature2Desc: Direct access to competitive sovereign debt instruments and reliable coupon payments.
Landing.platformTitle: Everything You Need in One Platform
Landing.platformDesc: A comprehensive suite of tools built specifically for sovereign bond investing and brokerage management.
Landing.howDesc: From registration to portfolio returns — a transparent, four-step process.
Landing.howStep1Desc: Register your account and complete KYC verification to get approved as an investor on the platform.
Landing.howStep2Desc: Browse open bond offerings and place your investment subscription order with your desired amount.
Landing.howStep3Desc: Your order enters the auction window. Upload payment proof while the subscription period is open.
Landing.howStep4Desc: Bonds are allocated pro-rata. Track your portfolio holdings and earn scheduled coupon payments.
Landing.partnerDesc1: Grow Your Brokerage. Reach More Investors. Modernize Your Business.
Landing.partnerDesc2: Join the African Government Bond Exchange (AGBX) and become part of the next generation of African capital markets. AGBX empowers licensed brokers with the technology to reach more investors, streamline operations, and offer a world-class digital investment experience.
Landing.partnerFeature1Desc: Serve institutional clients, wealth managers, and pension funds with institutional-grade tools.
Landing.partnerFeature2Desc: Expand your reach to retail investors globally through our seamless digital onboarding.
Landing.partnerFeature3Desc: Scale your business while significantly reducing manual work and administrative overhead.
Landing.partnerCTA: Apply to Become a Partner Broker

benefitsList.title: Access a Larger Investor Network
benefitsList.desc: Connect with qualified investors actively seeking African government bond opportunities from around the world.

benefitsList.title: Digitize Your Brokerage
benefitsList.desc: Replace spreadsheets, emails, and manual processes with a secure digital platform built specifically for sovereign bond investing.

benefitsList.title: Manage Thousands of Investors
benefitsList.desc: From onboarding and KYC to order management, allocations, reporting, and portfolio tracking—everything is managed from one intuitive dashboard.

benefitsList.title: Showcase Premium Government Bond Offerings
benefitsList.desc: List sovereign bond issuances in a professional marketplace where investors can easily discover and compare opportunities.

benefitsList.title: Faster Operations
benefitsList.desc: Automate investor onboarding, investment requests, document collection, notifications, and reporting so your team can focus on growing the business.

benefitsList.title: Build Trust
benefitsList.desc: Provide your clients with a modern investor portal where they can monitor investments, receive allocation confirmations, track coupon payments, and download statements anytime.

Landing.companyTitle: Building the Financial Infrastructure of Tomorrow
Landing.companyDesc: AGBX is backed by a consortium of leading financial technologists, economists, and legal experts dedicated to bridging the gap between national treasuries and everyday investors.

companyItems.title: Global Vision
companyItems.desc: Expanding digital financial inclusion across the continent and building bridges to international capital markets.

companyItems.title: Institutional Grade
companyItems.desc: Partnered with top-tier brokers and regulated financial entities.

companyItems.title: Secure & Compliant
companyItems.desc: Adhering to the strictest global regulatory standards for your peace of mind.

companyItems.title: Dedicated Team
companyItems.desc: Led by industry veterans with deep expertise in fintech, regulatory compliance, and emerging market debt.

companyItems.title: Fintech Innovation
companyItems.desc: Pioneering digital-first solutions for modern sovereign debt marketplaces.

companyItems.title: B2B Network
companyItems.desc: Empowering brokers with a complete white-label digital infrastructure.

Landing.ctaSubtitle: Join the Future of African Fixed Income
Landing.ctaDesc1: AGBX is building the digital infrastructure that connects licensed brokers, governments, financial institutions, and investors across Africa.
Landing.ctaDesc2: Be among the first brokers to modernize your business and expand your reach through one secure platform.
Landing.ctaBoxDesc: Reach more investors. Streamline your operations. Help shape the future of African government bond investing.
Landing.ctaBoxBtn: Become an AGBX Partner Broker Today
Landing.roleBenefitsDesc: Whether you are looking to invest in secure government bonds or manage the issuance process, AGBX provides the specialized tools you need.
Landing.investorDesc: Access a secure, transparent marketplace to invest in government bonds. Grow your wealth with reliable returns and real-time portfolio tracking.
investorBenefits: Direct access to primary market bond issuances
Secure digital KYC and onboarding process
Landing.brokerDesc: Streamline the entire bond lifecycle from issuance to allocation. Manage investors, verify payments, and generate comprehensive reports effortlessly.
Landing.offeringsDesc: Explore active and recent government bond offerings. Sign in to subscribe and invest.

Broker.onboardingDesc1: Join the African Government Bond Exchange (AGBX) and become part of the next generation of African capital markets.
Broker.onboardingDesc2: AGBX empowers licensed brokers with the technology to reach more investors, streamline operations, and offer a world-class digital investment experience.
Broker.onboardingDesc3: Whether you're serving institutional clients, wealth managers, pension funds, or retail investors, AGBX helps you scale your business while reducing manual work.
Broker.applicationPendingDesc: Your broker profile registration is under administrative review. Please ensure you have uploaded all required verifying credentials below.
Broker.uploadCredentialsDesc: Securely upload your Brokerage License and Identity Proof to expedite the approval process.
Broker.accountUnderReviewTitle: Your brokerage account is under review
Broker.accountUnderReviewDesc: Administrators are currently reviewing your submitted brokerage credentials. Full platform features will unlock upon approval.
Broker.failedLoadDashboard: Failed to load dashboard data. Please try again later.
Broker.kpiTotalAUMTooltip: Total Assets Under Management across all active portfolio holdings.
Broker.kpiTotalInvestorsTooltip: Number of verified investor accounts registered on the platform.
Broker.kpiActiveOfferingsTooltip: Number of bonds currently open for subscription.
Broker.kpiOrdersProcessedTooltip: Total number of orders submitted across the platform's lifetime.
Broker.kycQueueSubtitle: Review submitted credentials from pending investors.
Broker.allCaughtUpDesc: There are currently no pending investor KYC registration submissions requiring review.

Auth.createAccountDesc: Create an account as an Investor or a Partner Broker
Auth.partnerDesc: Create your Partner Broker account and expand your reach
Auth.startInvestingDesc: Create your Investor account to unlock high-yield opportunities
Auth.brokerSuccessMsg: Your application and documents have been submitted. You will be notified once an Administrator reviews your profile.
Auth.investorSuccessMsg: Your application and documents have been submitted. Our team will review your profile shortly.

Portfolio.overview: Overview of your investments, cashflows, and holdings.
Portfolio.docsReviewDesc: Administrators are currently reviewing your submitted KYC documents. Full platform features will unlock upon approval.

Marketplace.title: Bond Marketplace
Marketplace.subtitle: Discover and invest in premium government bonds.
Marketplace.noBondsDesc: Check back later for new government bond offerings or adjust your search filter term.
Marketplace.kycRequiredDesc: Your account is currently under review. You must be fully verified by a broker before you can invest in bonds.
Marketplace.bondDescPrefix: This government bond is issued by the
Marketplace.bondDescSuffix: . It offers a fixed return over the specified maturity period, making it a stable addition to your investment portfolio.

Orders.title: My Investment Orders
Orders.subtitle: Track and manage your bond allocations.
Orders.noOrdersDesc: You have not submitted any bond purchase orders yet. Browse our marketplace to view open listings.
Orders.uploadReceiptDesc: Please upload the proof of your bank transfer. Ensure the reference number is clearly visible.
Orders.confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this pending order?

Analytics.volumeTooltip: Shows the total aggregated requested amount of all orders placed over the last 30 days.
Analytics.pipelineTooltip: Live distribution of all orders currently moving through the platform, grouped by their exact status.
Analytics.auditTooltip: A chronologically ordered feed of recent critical financial transactions, such as order submissions, payment verifications, and bond allocations.

Bonds.title: Bond Management
Bonds.subtitle: Manage government bond offerings and their lifecycle.
Bonds.noBondsFound: No bonds found matching your criteria.
Bonds.confirmPublish: Are you sure you want to publish this bond? It will become visible to all investors.
Bonds.confirmClose: Are you sure you want to close this bond? No further investments will be allowed.
Bonds.confirmAllocation: Run the Allocation Engine? This will distribute bonds to all investors with verified payments.
Bonds.createSubtitle: Enter the terms of the new government bond offering. It will be saved as a Draft.
Bonds.errFaceValPos: Face value must be greater than 0
Bonds.errTotalIssuanceMin: Total issuance must be at least the face value
Bonds.errMinInvFace: Min investment must be at least the face value
Bonds.errMinInvMultiple: Min investment must be a multiple of the face value
Bonds.errMaturityFuture: Maturity date must be in the future
Bonds.failedCreateFallback: Please check inputs and ensure you are logged in.

BrokerOrders.title: Order Management
BrokerOrders.subtitle: Review and process incoming investment orders.
BrokerOrders.inboxZeroDesc: There are no investment orders to review at this time.
BrokerOrders.confirmApprove: Approve this order and request payment from the investor?
BrokerOrders.modalRejectReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this order is being rejected...
BrokerOrders.modalRejectReasonHint: This reason will be visible to the investor.

BrokerPayments.title: Payment Verification
BrokerPayments.subtitle: Review and verify uploaded bank transfer receipts from investors.
BrokerPayments.noPaymentsDesc: There are currently no payment records in the system.
BrokerPayments.confirmVerify: Are you sure you want to verify this payment?

BrokerAllocations.title: Allocation Manager
BrokerAllocations.subtitle: Preview and execute bond distributions to verified investors.
BrokerAllocations.confirmExecute: Are you sure you want to run allocation for {bondName}? This action cannot be undone.
BrokerAllocations.noVerifiedPayments: No verified payments found for this bond.

BrokerReports.title: Data Reports
BrokerReports.subtitle: Raw datasets and exportable lists for platform auditing.
BrokerReports.failedLoad: Failed to load report data. Please try again.

InvestorProfile.title: Investor Profile & KYC
InvestorProfile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and verification documents.
InvestorProfile.reqDocsSubtitle: To comply with Mozambican regulations, please upload all three required documents below.
InvestorProfile.docIdentityDesc: Bilhete de Identidade (BI), valid Passport, or DIRE.
InvestorProfile.docAddressDesc: Recent utility bill or bank statement (within 3 months).
InvestorProfile.docProofOfIncomeDesc: Employer letter or recent pay slip.
InvestorProfile.docSourceOfFundsDesc: Supporting document like a bank statement or asset declaration.
InvestorProfile.employmentDetailsDesc: Please provide your employment information and declare your source of funds.
InvestorProfile.msgUnderReview: Your documents are under review or already approved. No action is required.
InvestorProfile.msgReadySubmit: All required documents are ready for submission.
InvestorProfile.msgPleaseUpload: Please upload all three required documents above to submit for review.
InvestorProfile.errLoadProfileDesc: The backend API failed to return your profile data. The exact error is:

BrokerInvestorReview.modalRejectDesc: You are about to reject this application. You can provide an optional reason to help the investor correct the issue.
BrokerInvestorReview.placeholderRejectReason: E.g., ID is blurred, please upload a clearer copy.

AdminDashboard.title: System Administration
AdminDashboard.subtitle: Overview of users, settings configurations, and security audit log traces.
AdminDashboard.toolUsersDesc: Edit profiles, change roles, suspend users.
AdminDashboard.toolSettingsDesc: Toggle maintenance mode, adjust global limits.
AdminDashboard.toolLogsDesc: Inspect raw activity parameters and details.

AdminUsers.title: User Management Directory
AdminUsers.subtitle: Manage profile credentials, adjust roles, or deactivate platform access.
AdminUsers.searchPlaceholder: Search by first name, last name, or email...
AdminUsers.noUsersDesc: Try broadening your search keywords or adjustment parameters.

AdminLogs.title: Security & Activity Audit Trails
AdminLogs.subtitle: Chronological log of security checks, financial distributions, database mutations, and administrative events.
AdminLogs.noLogsDesc: Activities appear here dynamically as events trigger across the network.
AdminLogs.drawerSubtitle: Metadata parameters parsed for audit ID {id}

AdminSettings.title: Global System Configurations
AdminSettings.subtitle: Adjust platform variables, configure mock environments, and change operational thresholds.
AdminSettings.noSettingsDesc: Run seed scripts to generate initial system settings parameters.

Global.descAccessDenied: You do not have the required permissions to view this section of the platform.
